_description: Codex/Cursor Planner — EvoMap Pre-Solution Advisory Recall Hook Template
_note: This is a PORTABLE INSTALLATION TEMPLATE. It declares hook event types and advisory-only policy. Command paths and machine-specific values are REPLACEMENT SLOTS. No real token, node_secret, API key, absolute home-directory path, task archive path, or memory capsule path is included.

SessionStart.description: Pre-solution advisory recall. Fires when a planning session begins. Must not change task level, permission mode, review gate, or verification gate.
SessionStart.input_signals: concise non-secret task signals from the current request

UserPromptSubmit.description: Task signal capture for recall input. Must not read secrets, full task archives, or private memory capsules.

PostToolUse.description: Signal detection for method improvement. Advisory only — does not change task classification.

required_when_available: hit signals (Gene / Capsule / EvolutionEvent / method pattern / none)
rejection (what was retrieved but rejected, with reason)
